debug_info.goal:
d : Type u_1
inst✝² : Fintype d
inst✝¹ : DecidableEq d
𝕜 : Type u_5
inst✝ : RCLike 𝕜
A B : Matrix d d 𝕜
hA : A.IsHermitian
hB : B.IsHermitian
hAB : Commute A B
j : d
⊢ A.mulVec ((@Matrix.sharedEigenbasis d inst✝² inst✝¹ 𝕜 inst✝ A B hA hB hAB) j) =
    @Matrix.SharedEigenbasis.sharedEigenvalueA d inst✝² inst✝¹ 𝕜 inst✝ A B hA hB hAB j •
      WithLp.ofLp ((@Matrix.sharedEigenbasis d inst✝² inst✝¹ 𝕜 inst✝ A B hA hB hAB) j)

failed_attempts:
have h₁ : A *ᵥ (sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB j) = (sharedEigenvalueA hA hB hAB) j • WithLp.ofLp (sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB j) := by
    -- Use the fact that sharedEigenbasis is an eigenvector of A
    -- and derive the corresponding eigenvalue
    have h₂ : A *ᵥ (sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB j) = (sharedEigenvalueA hA hB hAB) j • WithLp.ofLp (sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB j) := by
      sorry
    exact h₂
  exact h₁

have h1 : A *ᵥ (sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB j) = (sharedEigenvalueA hA hB hAB) j • WithLp.ofLp (sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB j) := by
    -- Use the fact that A is Hermitian and the shared eigenbasis is an orthonormal basis of eigenvectors for A
    have h2 : A.IsHermitian := hA
    have h3 : OrthonormalBasis d 𝕜 (EuclideanSpace 𝕜 d) :=
      Matrix.sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB
    -- Since A is Hermitian, it is diagonalizable, and its eigenvectors form a complete orthogonal basis
    -- Each vector in the shared eigenbasis is an eigenvector of A
    -- Therefore, A *ᵥ (sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB j) = (sharedEigenvalueA hA hB hAB) j • WithLp.ofLp (sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB j)
    simpa [Matrix.SharedEigenbasis.sharedEigenvalueA, Matrix.mulVec, Pi.mul_apply,
      Finset.sum_smul, smul_smul] using
      (h3.repr' (A *ᵥ (sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB j)))
        (by
          -- Use the fact that A *ᵥ (sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB j) is in the Euclidean space
          have h4 : A *ᵥ (sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB j) ∈ Set.univ := by
            trivial
          -- Use the representation of the vector in the shared eigenbasis
          exact Set.mem_univ _)
  exact h1

have h₁ : A.toLinearMap.mulVec (WithLp.ofLp (sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB j : (EuclideanSpace 𝕜 d))) =
    (sharedEigenvalueA hA hB hAB) j • WithLp.ofLp (sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB j : (EuclideanSpace 𝕜 d)) := by
    sorry
  -- Convert the linear map application to matrix multiplication
  have h₂ : (A.toLinearMapmulVec (WithLp.ofLp (sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB j : (EuclideanSpace 𝕜 d))) : (EuclideanSpace 𝕜 d)) =
    (A *ᵥ WithLp.ofLp (sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB j : (EuclideanSpace 𝕜 d))) := by
    simp [Matrix.toLin_mulVec]
  -- Simplify the expression using the above equality
  calc
    A *ᵥ (sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB j : (WithLp _ _)) = (A.toLinearMap.mulVec (WithLp.ofLp (sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB j : (EuclideanSpace 𝕜 d))) : (EuclideanSpace 𝕜 d)) := by
      simp [Matrix.toLin_mulVec, PiLp.ofLp_apply]
    _ = (sharedEigenvalueA hA hB hAB) j • WithLp.ofLp (sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB j : (EuclideanSpace 𝕜 d)) := by
      rw [h₁]
    _ = (sharedEigenvalueA hA hB hAB) j • WithLp.ofLp (sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB j : (EuclideanSpace 𝕜 d)) := by rfl
  <;> simp_all [Matrix.toLin_mulVec]
  <;> aesop

have h₁ : (A.toLinearMap).symm := by simpa using (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA)
  have h₂ : ∃ (μ : Eigenvalue ℝ (A.toLinearMap)), (LinearMap.eigenspace (A.toLinearMap) (μ : ℝ)) ⊲ (sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB j) := by
    sorry
  obtain ⟨μ, hμ⟩ := h₂
  have h₃ : (A.toLinearMap) (sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB j) = (μ : 𝕜) • (sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB j) := by
    sorry
  have h₄ : A *ᵥ (sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB j) = (↑(μ.realPart) : 𝕜) • WithLp.ofLp (sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB j) := by
    sorry
  have h₅ : (sharedEigenvalueA hA hB hAB) j = (μ : ℝ).realPart := by
    sorry
  have h₆ : (multiplicative.ofReal 1 : 𝕜) = 1 := by
    simp [multiplicative.ofReal_one]
  simp_all [h₅, h₆, smul_smul]
  <;>
  try norm_cast <;>
  try simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, RCLike.coe_eq_zero] <;>
  try ring_nf at * <;>
  try simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, RCLike.coe_eq_zero] <;>
  try norm_num <;>
  try linarith
